title: Madhya Pradesh HC initiates contempt case against BJP MLA who tried to contact judge about pending case
description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court has directed its registry to register a suo motu criminal contempt of court petition against BJP Member of Legislative Assembly (MLA) Sanjay Pathak for attempting to contact a High Court regarding a pending case [Ashutosh Dixit v Economic Offences Wing & Ors]. A Division Bench of Chief Justice Sanjeev Sachdeva and Justice Vinay Saraf said that it was of the prima facie view that Pathak's conduct may amount to a criminal contempt of court.Accordingly, it directed
